acceptance.proof: A public-safe fixture binds the pinned official document revision/hash, default n=8 exchanges, exact RTT and OFS formulas, minimum-associated-RTT selection, and periodic measurement wording.

The evidence preserves the symmetric-delay condition, half-asymmetry bias statement, and the document's assignment of offset-history/timestamp mapping to the recipient rather than inventing candidate policy.

Every fact remains official public-documentation specification evidence; no implementation source, black-box observation, packet fixture, clock sample, algorithm candidate, or runtime result is committed.
No clock read, UDP packet, socket, timer, filter, offset correction, currentness, discovery runtime, dependencies, unsafe/FFI, devices, private artifacts, or Manifold authority are added.

commit_policy: Commit specification evidence separately from any numeric, clock-filter, packet, correction, or runtime contract.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route exact LSLC-002L clock-offset evidence and prohibit runtime inference.
Describe only the public clock-offset evidence and limitations.
Reviewed public/private routing; no shared-skill mutation expected.
Reviewed evidence roles and clock/authority separation; no shared-skill mutation expected.

non_scope: Clock/timer access, timestamps, packet encoding/parsing, sockets, UDP exchange, retry/scheduling, sampling, clock filtering, numeric computation, offset history, correction mapping, smoothing, or dejitter.
Currentness, freshness, provider evidence, discovery runtime, reachability, interoperability, activation, or performance/accuracy claims.
Dependencies, features, unsafe, FFI, devices, private artifacts, implementation-source inspection, black-box observation, or Manifold authority.
objective: Record exact pinned official public-documentation evidence for the clock-offset measurement sequence, formulas, default exchange count, minimum-RTT selection, symmetry limitation, and recipient-owned mapping boundary before any clock or synchronization candidate contract is proposed.
outputs: Deterministic checker rejecting fact, evidence-role, or limitation drift.
Public routing/validation documentation, Standard receipt, and exact-ID executed no-force feature-push receipt.
